chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Revision Application No.106 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For hearing of main case ----------------------------- 18.02.2025 Chaudhry Muhammad Rafiq Rajorvi, Additional A.G. Sindh Ms. Amna Ansari, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh ----------------------------------- Applicant is called absent, without intimation. In terms of order dated 29.01.2025, applicant was directed to submit his written submissions but he did not submits the same. Non-appearance of the applicant shows that he has lost interest in pursuing the instant criminal revision application, which is dismissed on account of non-prosecution. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
